build._comment: EAS-01 — Build profiles for development simulator, internal QA testing, and store production. M2 — production host now config-driven via PLANSCAPE_HOST so app.config.js can derive every URL from one variable.

env._comment: M2 — set PLANSCAPE_HOST to the real domain before EAS build. Empty value will fail closed in app.config.js.

submit._comment: M3 — store-submit credentials are read from EAS secrets at submit time, not committed to source. Set them with: eas secret:create --scope project --name APPLE_ID --value '...'  (and APPLE_ASC_APP_ID, APPLE_TEAM_ID). The production submit block below is intentionally absent — running `eas submit` without it falls back to an interactive prompt, which is safer than a placeholder that would otherwise mask 'I forgot to fill these in' as a real submit attempt.
